socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Secondary Debuff Deals 2266.4 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect

Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 78 to 117 Added Fire Damage
